creator.description: Happy-path content creator: lands on theyRead, scrolls feed, opens Create Post form, fills title + long-form content + tags, submits successfully, redirects back to /lifestyle. Story: complete post-submission funnel for the lifestyle vertical. Dashboard: funnel landing → Create Post Clicked → Submit Post Clicked → Post Submitted → /lifestyle redirect. Pairs with comment-confused and bouncer to expose the creator-to-bouncer ratio.

actions.text: After years of chasing every new fad, I realized that authenticity matters more than novelty. Here is what changed for me and why I think you might benefit from doing the same.
